h1.visual_description: Large, bold serif font used for major section or activity titles.
h1.example_text: Activity 4. Determining CEC by replacing adsorbed cations.

h2.visual_description: Bold serif font, slightly smaller than h1, used for table titles and captions.
h2.example_text: Table 13.2. Effect of cations on flocculation of a clay suspension.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Instructional prompt or action item requiring student input/observation.
Representation of a chemical reaction occurring during the procedure.
Mathematical calculation showing unit conversions and stoichiometric steps.

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX block ($$ ... $$) for chemical formulas, reactions, and multi-step fractional calculations.
markdown_grammar.citation_format: Internal cross-references to tables (e.g., 'Table 13.2'); no external citations visible.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text containing page number and section title (e.g., '114 | Soil Colloids').
